─[ Claude Code PreToolUse Output Format ]─ ┐

name: claude-code-pretooluse-output-format description: PreToolUse hooks must use hookSpecificOutput format — top-level decision fields are deprecated and cause false “hook error” labels user-invocable: false allowed-tools: Read, Edit, Write

Claude Code PreToolUse Output Format

PreToolUse hooks in Claude Code require hookSpecificOutput for decision control. The top-level decision and reason fields are deprecated for this event and cause false “hook error” labels in the UI even when hooks execute successfully.

Correct Format

Allow with context injection

{
  "hookSpecificOutput": {
    "hookEventName": "PreToolUse",
    "permissionDecision": "allow",
    "additionalContext": "Message injected into Claude's context"
  }
}

Deny (block the tool call)

{
  "hookSpecificOutput": {
    "hookEventName": "PreToolUse",
    "permissionDecision": "deny",
    "permissionDecisionReason": "Reason shown to Claude"
  }
}

Ask (escalate to user)

{
  "hookSpecificOutput": {
    "hookEventName": "PreToolUse",
    "permissionDecision": "ask",
    "permissionDecisionReason": "Reason shown to user"
  }
}

Snags

  • Silent allow: Exit 0 with no stdout. No JSON needed — don’t output {"decision":"proceed"}.
  • hookEventName is required: Must be "PreToolUse" inside hookSpecificOutput.
  • Field name change: additional_context (snake_case) became additionalContext (camelCase). reason became permissionDecisionReason.
  • permissionDecision values: "allow" (not "approve"/"proceed"), "deny" (not "block"), "ask".
  • Other events are different: PostToolUse, Stop, UserPromptSubmit still use top-level decision: "block" and reason. Only PreToolUse and PermissionRequest use hookSpecificOutput.
  • Symptom: UI shows PreToolUse:<Tool> hook error on every matching tool call, but the tool call still proceeds. Easy to mistake for a transient issue.
  • updatedInput: Optional field to modify tool input before execution. Combine with "allow" to auto-approve modified input.

Diagnosis

If you see PreToolUse:Read hook error (or Glob, Write, Edit) in the Claude Code UI, grep hook output for top-level decision:

grep -r 'JSON.stringify.*decision.*proceed\|decision.*block' .lore/hooks/

Any PreToolUse hook producing {"decision": ...} at the top level needs migration.

PgUp/PgDn: scroll b: bulk commands q: quit x: menu ← → ↑ ↓: navigate
Donate 0.24.4
